title: Senior Teacher - Teach For India - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Teach For India - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Teach For India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Teach For India:
Teach For India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Teach For India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
